_doc: Themed enemy kingdoms. Each borrows a base Panji faction's hero/ultimate/bonus, then overrides the display name + banner colour and layers on a specialty modifier. Used for the 2 (Easy) or 4 (Normal) rival AI kingdoms.

themes.name: Black Magic Cult
themes.specialty: Dark sorcery — shadow warriors that strike from the treeline

themes.name: Drug King's Syndicate
themes.specialty: Crazed, drugged fighters that move and train faster

themes.name: Corruption Master
themes.specialty: Bribery and graft flood their coffers with gold

themes.name: Pirate Lord's Fleet
themes.specialty: Hardened sea-raiders with very tough infantry
